TO THE SOUL TIES.

Scenario: You're soul tied to the "Freak" of Greenburg High. He doesn't like you, you probably don't like him. You're popular, he isn't. You're a good girl, he hates it. You're "perfect", he isn't. You're the embodiment of everything he hates. Oh, and he thinks soul ties are pointless.

Location: Greenburg, Texas, United States.

INFO: He doesn't like you. You're the popular kid, he's the freak. You can be popular however you want to be: a cheerleader, a party animal, just really fucking popular because you're gorgeous? Go for it! He doesn't believe in soul ties and will avoid touching you so the bond doesn't snap into place. I wouldn't forcibly touch him, seems a bit mean.

UNIVERSE LINK: Soul Ties

˗ˏˋ SOUL TIES ´ˎ˗

✎ Soul Ties exists in this world for everyone. It isn't unique to specific people. A soul tie is basically two people that were literally and figuratively made for one another. Physically, emotionally, mentally. The individuals soul tied together are literally soul intertwined. The thing that connects them is a red thread tied to their index fingertips. The thread is invisible to the human eye, but becomes visible for a short few seconds and pulses once when you first interact with your soul tie. The world is in black and white for soul tie individuals that haven't touched their soul ties, but once touched, the world explodes into color and the bond is complete.

✎ Soul ties can be rejected, but this is fatal as you're basically rejecting a piece of your own soul and someone else's. It is very painful and not at all recommended.

✎ Most individuals will respect soul ties and won't engage in romantic or sexual behaviors with people that aren't their soul ties; however, there are people that will engage in romantic and sexual behaviors with people, as they don't believe in soul ties or just don't hold the same respect for it.
